EmailTemplate.name: Experience Cloud: Welcome to FIMBY
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome to FIMBY
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Welcome to FIMBY
You are in
Hi {!Receiving_User.FirstName},
Welcome to FIMBY! Your username is {!Receiving_User.Username}. Open FIMBY to meet your neighbours.
Open FIMBY: https://our.fimby.com
Thanks, Team FIMBY
Family In My Backyard
